evals.prompt: Write a Playwright test to verify that a consent banner appears on first visit and does not appear after the user accepts consent
expected_patterns: storageState: undefined OR test.use({ storageState: undefined })

evals.prompt: Test that no non-essential cookies are set before the user gives consent. Create a helper function to classify cookies as strictly necessary vs analytics.
anti_patterns: trusting CMP without verifying actual cookies

evals.prompt: Verify that a site honors Global Privacy Control (Sec-GPC: 1) header: the browser exposes navigator.globalPrivacyControl and no marketing cookies are present
expected_patterns: _fbp OR _fbc OR _gcl OR marketing cookie names

evals.prompt: Write a test to verify Google Consent Mode v2 compliance: check that default consent state is 'denied' for ad_storage, analytics_storage, ad_user_data, and ad_personalization
anti_patterns: defaulting to granted instead of denied

evals.prompt: Create a test that checks for tracking scripts (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, TikTok Analytics) loading before consent. Use page.on('request') to monitor network requests.
expected_patterns: google-analytics.com OR googletagmanager.com OR facebook.net OR analytics.tiktok.com

evals.prompt: Write a test that validates cookie attributes (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite) match a typed cookie inventory. Define the inventory as CookieDefinition interface with name, category, maxExpiry, secure, httpOnly, sameSite.
Create a test to detect unknown cookies that are not in the cookie inventory. This test should visit multiple pages and flag any cookies found that aren't explicitly defined.
expected_patterns: inventory drift OR Add to cookie-inventory

evals.prompt: Test for Better Ads Standards compliance: verify that no auto-playing video ads have sound. Read the live DOM properties (el.autoplay, el.muted) rather than the HTML attributes, since player scripts mute videos via JS without setting the muted attribute.
anti_patterns: checking only for autoplay without muted requirement

evals.prompt: Write a test to measure mobile ad density (ads must not exceed 30% of viewport on mobile). Detect ad elements by class, id, or data attributes and calculate total ad height vs page height.
Test that AI-generated content is marked with a transparency disclosure (e.g., 'AI-generated' or 'powered by AI') as required by EU AI Act Article 50
